versions.version_description: Fixed missing chord highlight that was missing and cleaned up headers.
This version uses a capo on the 4th fret in order to play the hook similarly to the original.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Depending on how you want to play it the chords throughout the song are:

Capo 1st fret: [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
No capo:  [ch]Ebm[/ch]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]  [ch]Abm[/ch]  [ch]Ebm[/ch]
Half step down:  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]


Capo 1st fret version:

[Intro]
N.C.
Hahahahahahahahahahhaha
N.C.
Feel good

City's breaking down on a camel's back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                               [ch]Dm[/ch]
They just have to go 'cause they don't know wack[/tab]

So all you fill the streets, it's appealing to see[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm[/ch]                                      [ch]Dm[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab]  [ch]Gm[/ch]                       [ch]Dm[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Gm[/ch]                                     [ch]Dm[/ch]

[ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]


[Chorus]

Windmill, windmill for the land[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
